---
title: "dummycoding"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
hoteldata <- readRDS("hoteldata_og.rds")
```

```{r}

hotel_d <- as.data.frame(model.matrix(~ . -1, data = hoteldata))

anyNA(hotel_d)
str(hotel_d)

library(janitor)

hotel_d <- clean_names(hotel_d)

saveRDS(hotel_d, file = "dummy_no_normalization.rds")

```

# unused normalization

minmax <- function(x){
  (x - min(x)) / (max(x) - min(x))
}

hotel_n_na <- as.data.frame(lapply(hotel_d, minmax))

str(hotel_n_na)

hotel_n <- na.omit(hotel_n_na)

anyNA(hotel_n)
str(hotel_n)



saveRDS(hotel_n, file = "hotel_dummy.rds")

str(hotel_n)

anyNA(hotel_n)
